questions.question: Who wrote the story 'The Fun They Had'?
questions.answer: Isaac Asimov wrote the story.

questions.question: Who are the main characters in the story?
questions.answer: The main characters are Margie and Tommy.

questions.question: How old was Margie?
questions.answer: Margie was eleven years old.

questions.question: How old was Tommy?
questions.answer: Tommy was thirteen years old.

questions.question: Where did Tommy find the book?
questions.answer: Tommy found the book in the attic.

questions.question: What was special about the book?
questions.answer: It was a real printed book with fixed pages.

questions.question: Why did Margie find the book strange?
questions.answer: Because the words on the pages did not move.

questions.question: What kind of teacher did Margie have?
questions.answer: She had a mechanical teacher.

questions.question: Where was Margie's school located?
questions.answer: Her school was in her house.

questions.question: What subject was Margie struggling with?
questions.answer: Margie was struggling with geography.

questions.question: Who came to repair the mechanical teacher?
questions.answer: The County Inspector came to repair it.

questions.question: What did the County Inspector adjust?
questions.answer: He adjusted the geography sector.

questions.question: Where did students put their homework?
questions.answer: They put it in a slot in the mechanical teacher.

questions.question: What displayed the lessons?
questions.answer: A large screen displayed the lessons.

questions.question: What did Tommy say about old schools?
questions.answer: Old schools had human teachers.

questions.question: Where were old schools located?
questions.answer: Old schools were in special buildings.

questions.question: How did students study in old schools?
questions.answer: Students studied together in classrooms.

questions.question: Why did Margie dislike her school?
questions.answer: Because she had to study alone with a machine.

questions.question: What did the old book describe?
questions.answer: It described the schools of the past.

questions.question: What was Margie writing at the beginning?
questions.answer: She was writing in her diary.

questions.question: What date did Margie write in her diary?
Why were the pages of the book yellow?
questions.answer: Because the book was very old.

questions.question: What did Tommy say about telebooks?
questions.answer: He said telebooks were not like old printed books.

questions.question: What did Margie imagine at the end?
questions.answer: She imagined children enjoying school together.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the story?
questions.answer: The story highlights the value of human teachers and classroom learning.
